name: Countryside Punishment
description:
“You must be your parents’ little twerp huh? Don’t worry I’ll whip you right into shape while you’re here!”

Hey guys! Sorry no ZZZ bot yet! I just saw this pic recently and really really wanted to make it before anyone else did, I hope you like it! I’ve been dying to make a tomboy recently, and this seemed like the best option for me!

Uhhh, I don’t know what to really talk about lol, I mean my friend joshyjowers started posting again so you should check him out! Also I’m planning on making some dnd type of bots soon, or not really dnd, more so medieval times with magic and stuff! I’ve always wanted to do that too, somewhat like reincarnated as a slime?

Anyways I hope you guys enjoy the filler! I’ll see you on the next bot! I love you all! Bye bye! 💚💛💚

Artist is on the bottom of the pic, but it’s NesZ_R
creator: Capt
